title: Text Corpora & Normalization
code:
import re

def clean_text(text):
    # Lowercasing and cleaning
    text = text.lower()
    # Simple word tokenization
    tokens = re.findall(r'\b\w+\b', text)
    return tokens

if __name__ == '__main__':
    print(clean_text('The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.'))
